description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG by shooting a bouncing projectile which bounces [4->3] times starting from the nearest enemy. The further the enemy, the more DMG inflicted.
Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies [random enemy and surrounding enemies -> furthest away in a small range], and stuns them for [1 sec->3 sec]. The further the enemy, the more DMG they will take.
Deals ??? M.DMG to target enemies in range, and reduces target's Crit Chance by [25%->100%] for 7 sec.

When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking it away for [0.5 sec->2 sec]. [increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec -> (removed) increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec].

light.unified: Gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill. [Damage increases by 50% -> (removed) Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Enemies hit are stunned for [1 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: In exchange for 2 additional Mana Cost, attacks [nearest enemy -> random enemies] [bounces 4 times -> 3 times].

dark.unified: Ignores enemy Block. [Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy -> (removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy].

light.unified: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 150 for 7 sec. [Damage increases by 50% -> (removed) Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, knock back the enemy over a long distance. [For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150 -> (removed) For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150].

description.unified: [Pew!] Increases DMG by [ {0}% -> 20% ], and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by [ 200 -> {0} ].
[Twinkle Twinkle] Crit Chance Reduction will not be dispelled, and the effect duration will increase by {0} sec.
[Gotcha!] Greatly increases the knockback range, and Cooldown is reduced by {0} sec.

dark.unified: Grants Blessing of the Carrot. Blessing of the Carrot increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [10%->30%], and reduces DMG received by [10%->30%].

description.unified: Increases Crit DMG by {0}%, DMG of normal attacks by {1}% and the Range by {2}%.
